channel.title: misc on Hexomedine
channel.description: Recent content in misc on Hexomedine

item.title: [Root-Me 10k CTF] Misc - White Rabbit
item.description: The CTF The Root-Me 10k CTF was organized to celebrate the 10k members on the discord of Root-Me. It was a fun CTF with interesting challenges. The categories were : OSINT, Misc, Web, Forensic, Pwn, Reverse, Programming, Intro and Crypto. I managed to get to the 18th place. The challenge In this challenge, we had to exploit a discord bot. In fact, there was an OS command injection in the bot.
